findings.problem: The document quote gives a cause-of-death toxicology that conflicts with the canonical continuity record for Tomas. In a chapter that asks the reader to trust documentary precision, this contradiction breaks factual authority.
findings.rewrite_direction: At snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_18.md:90, align the quoted certificate toxicology with continuity canon; then keep Marisol's fact-claim language consistent at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_18.md:134. If you intend record variance, stage that discrepancy explicitly in the same section instead of leaving an unexplained mismatch.
findings.acceptance_test: PASS if the toxicology in snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_18.md:90 either matches canon or is explicitly labeled as a variant record, and Marisol's explanation near snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_18.md:134 acknowledges that same status. FAIL if conflicting causes remain with no in-scene explanation.

findings.problem: Sanitization drift at the scene peak: the paternity challenge and walkout are high-pressure public threats, but the chapter quickly shifts into summary bookkeeping and reassurance. Tension is defused before concrete social consequence lands on-page.
findings.rewrite_direction: Expand immediate fallout in snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_18.md:152 and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_18.md:160-163 with one concrete repercussion triggered by the confrontation (for example: post spread, canceled invite, hostile text, or safety concern). Carry that repercussion into snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_18.md:262-284 so consequence remains active through the close.
findings.acceptance_test: PASS if the revised chapter shows at least one explicit external consequence tied to the Q&A confrontation before the ending and one embodied stress response from Marisol linked to that consequence. FAIL if the text still jumps from walkout to wrap-up without concrete blowback.

findings.problem: Causal bridge weakness: the public-room conflict thread does not materially shape the subsequent Ada negotiation, so the chapter reads as two adjacent set pieces instead of one cause-and-effect arc.
findings.rewrite_direction: Insert a transition beat between snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_18.md:176 and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_18.md:198 where fallout from the reading actively changes what Marisol asks for or concedes in the boundary checklist at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_18.md:210.
findings.acceptance_test: PASS if at least one boundary term in the Ada exchange (around snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_18.md:198-214) is explicitly motivated by the just-finished reading conflict. FAIL if the negotiation remains interchangeable with a version where the walkout never happened.

findings.problem: Marisol's high-pressure Q&A replies are consistently polished and complete, with minimal interruption, self-correction, or rough-edge pressure texture. That softens her stress signature and makes the exchange sound pre-shaped rather than live.
findings.rewrite_direction: Revise Marisol's responses at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_18.md:122, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_18.md:134, and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_18.md:144 to include spoken-pressure texture (restart, cutoff, interruption, or blunt colloquial turn) while preserving factual accountability.
findings.acceptance_test: PASS if at least two Marisol replies in snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_18.md:122-158 include visible disfluency and at least one line uses pressure-appropriate colloquial phrasing. FAIL if every reply remains syntactically pristine mini-essay speech.

findings.problem: Mechanical lexical repetition: math/rent aphorism language repeats until it reads like style-token reuse instead of organic motif development, flattening line-level freshness.
findings.rewrite_direction: Keep the motif concentrated in the setup exchange at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_18.md:10-14 and one later callback; rewrite the other math-tag lines at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_18.md:166, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_18.md:168, and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_18.md:236 with different concrete financial diction tied to the immediate moment.
findings.acceptance_test: PASS if the word 'math' appears in no more than two dialogue lines across the chapter and each replacement line still conveys financial pressure through specific scene detail. FAIL if repeated math slogans remain the dominant economic diction.

findings.problem: A 10+ paragraph stretch runs on externally observable action/dialogue without explicit interior thought, sensation, memory, or self-assessment from the focalizer. At a hinge between public trial and private negotiation, that exteriority makes the chapter temporarily read like stage blocking.
findings.rewrite_direction: Add interior beats within snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_18.md:164-190 (for example: bodily aftershock, intrusive thought, or self-assessment) so the focal distance remains close-third before Ada's evaluative line lands.
findings.acceptance_test: PASS if each five-paragraph segment inside snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_18.md:164-190 contains at least one explicit interior beat from Marisol. FAIL if the passage remains purely external until the commentary at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_18.md:192.

summary: Chapter 18 lands key continuity markers and relationship-state beats, but fails review due one HIGH continuity contradiction, HIGH sanitization/tension defusal in the confrontation aftermath, and additional MEDIUM weaknesses in causal linkage, dialogue pressure texture, lexical repetition, and interiority continuity.
